name: SIL Electricity
description: Monitor your electricity consumption from Services Industriels de Lausanne

pricePerKwh.title: Price per kWh (CHF)
pricePerKwh.description: Your SIL electricity rate. Find it on your latest bill (typical: 0.25 to 0.35).

injectionPricePerKwh.title: Injection price per kWh (CHF)
injectionPricePerKwh.description: Credit you receive for solar production injected into the grid.

chart.name: Consumption Chart
chart.description: Configurable consumption chart by period and style

live.name: Live Consumption
live.description: Latest 15-minute reading with a mini area chart of recent activity

summary.name: Monthly Summary
summary.description: Current month consumption with trend vs previous month

cost.name: Monthly Cost
cost.description: Estimated electricity cost for the current month based on your kWh price

ui.noCookie: Add your lausanne.ch email and password in plugin settings
ui.authError: Login failed. Check your email and password in plugin settings
ui.networkError: Could not reach SIL. Check your connection
ui.rateLimited: SIL temporarily blocked automated login (CAPTCHA). Retrying later.
